query:
SELECT id, connectionId, locationAddress, serviceType, supplierName, customerName
FROM services
WHERE (
  locationAddress LIKE '%127 Adelaide%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%122 Adelaide%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Bloomfield%Cleveland%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Anzac%Kippa%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Maryborough%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Esplanade%Torquay%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Margaret%Coolum%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Varsity%Sippy%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Creek St%Brisbane%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Coronation%Milton%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Melbourne St%South Brisbane%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%Terrence%Brendale%'
  OR locationAddress LIKE '%104 Melbourne%'
)
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 20;
